title: ESCALATE: Legacy scripts still shipped and symlinked by install.sh

text: {"type":"escalate","finding":"Legacy scripts still shipped and symlinked","severity":"Important","description":"tmux-status-quota-fetch and tmux-status-quota-poll are deprecated per DESIGN.md but install.sh:22 still symlinks both into ~/.local/bin/. The install script even kills old quota-poll processes (acknowledging replacement) but then symlinks the scripts anyway. Users could be confused about which system is active.","options":[{"label":"Option 1: Remove from SCRIPTS array in install.sh","solution":"Remove the two deprecated scripts from the SCRIPTS array so they're no longer symlinked on fresh installs. Keep files in repo for reference.","pros":"Clean install experience, no user confusion, uninstaller already handles old symlinks","cons":"Existing users who upgrade may still have old symlinks until they run uninstall/reinstall"},{"label":"Option 2: Add deprecation warnings to scripts","solution":"Print a one-time deprecation warning on first execution, informing user to use the server instead.","pros":"Gentle migration path","cons":"More code to maintain for deprecated scripts"}],"recommendation":"Option 1 — clean break, uninstaller handles cleanup","promotion_reason":"Natural FIX promoted to ESCALATE — max fix cycles (3) reached after 4 cycles"}

Acceptance (fix-cycle-5, T1.4):
- [ ] `scripts/tmux-status-quota-fetch` does not exist (`test ! -f scripts/tmux-status-quota-fetch`)
- [ ] `scripts/tmux-status-quota-poll` does not exist (`test ! -f scripts/tmux-status-quota-poll`)
- [ ] `install.sh` SCRIPTS array does not contain `tmux-status-quota-fetch`
- [ ] `install.sh` SCRIPTS array does not contain `tmux-status-quota-poll`
- [ ] `bash -n install.sh` exits 0 (no syntax errors)
- [ ] The install.sh SCRIPTS array still contains the 5 remaining scripts
